[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011101100 6
1 1011101011 7
2 0111111111 9
3 0111111101 8
4 1011101111 8
5 1011101011 7
6 0111111111 9
7 0111111101 8

01 10 0011001111 6
12 21 0011111111 8
23 32 1011111101 8
34 43 1011101111 8 match 4
45 54 1111111111 a

67 76 0111011111 8
70 07 0011001011 5

35 53 1111111101 9
46 64 1111111111 a

36 63 1111111101 9

72 27 0011111111 8
